name: Nitrile Examination Gloves, Medium, Powder-Free
description: Powder-free nitrile examination gloves for general healthcare use. Latex-free, textured fingertips for tactile sensitivity. Suitable for clinical exams, medication handling, and routine patient care.

name: Nitrile Examination Gloves, Large, Powder-Free
description: Powder-free nitrile examination gloves for general healthcare use, large size. Latex-free, textured fingertips. Same specifications as Medium variant in larger sizing for hand circumference 9-10 inches.

name: Chemo-Tested Nitrile Gloves, Medium
description: Heavier-gauge nitrile gloves tested per ASTM D6978 for chemotherapy drug permeation. Required for compounding hazardous drugs in USP 800 environments.

name: N95 Particulate Respirator, Cup-Style
description: NIOSH-approved N95 respirator with cup-style design. Filters at least 95% of airborne particles. Latex-free straps, adjustable nose clip. Single-use.

name: 3-Ply Procedure Mask, Earloop, Box of 50
description: 3-ply pleated procedure masks with bacterial filtration efficiency >=98%. Earloop design, pliable nose wire, latex-free. ASTM Level 1 fluid resistance.

name: Level 2 Isolation Gown, Large
description: AAMI Level 2 isolation gown providing low-fluid-resistant protection. Long sleeves with knit cuffs, full back coverage with neck and waist ties. Single-use.

name: Sterile Gauze Pads 4x4 inch, Sleeve of 200
description: 12-ply sterile cotton gauze pads, 4 x 4 inch. For absorbing exudate, cleansing wounds, and applying topical medication. Sterile in individual peel-pouches.

name: Elastic Bandage Roll, 4 inch x 5 yd
description: Self-closing elastic bandage roll for compression and support of soft-tissue injuries. 4 inch wide, stretches to 5 yards. Latex-free.

name: Foam Dressing 4x4 inch, Box of 10
description: Hydrophilic polyurethane foam dressing with semi-permeable backing for moderate-to-heavy exudate wounds. Atraumatic removal. Sterile.

name: Chlorhexidine Gluconate 2% Antiseptic Solution, 500mL
description: 2% chlorhexidine gluconate antiseptic solution for skin preparation prior to procedures. Tinted for visibility. 500mL pump-dispenser bottle.

name: IV Catheter, 20 gauge x 1.25 in, Box of 50
description: Peripheral IV catheter with safety needle-stick prevention. 20 gauge, 1.25 inch length. Designed for routine peripheral access in adult patients.

name: Primary IV Administration Set, 78 inch
description: Primary IV administration set with macro-drip chamber (15 drops/mL), roller clamp, and luer-lock distal connector. DEHP-free tubing. Each set sterile.

name: Sterile Syringe 10mL with Luer-Lock, Box of 100
description: Sterile, single-use 10 mL syringe with luer-lock connector. Latex-free plunger seal. Graduations every 0.2 mL.

name: Infrared Forehead Thermometer, Clinical Grade
description: Non-contact infrared forehead thermometer with clinical-grade accuracy (+/- 0.2 degC). 1-second reading, fever alarm. Two-year warranty.

name: Adult Reusable Blood Pressure Cuff
description: Reusable single-tube adult blood pressure cuff with bladder. Compatible with most automated and manual sphygmomanometers. Latex-free, antimicrobial-treated nylon.

name: Dual-Head Acoustic Stethoscope
description: Dual-head acoustic stethoscope suitable for general clinical use. Latex-free PVC tubing, non-chill rim, soft-touch eartips.

name: Specimen Collection Cup, 90mL, Sleeve of 100
description: Polypropylene specimen cup with screw-cap lid, 90 mL capacity. Suitable for urine and other non-sterile fluid collection.

name: Hospital-Grade Disinfectant Wipes, Canister of 160
description: Hospital-grade quaternary-ammonium disinfectant wipes with 1-minute contact time for bacteria/viruses. EPA-registered. Canister of 160 wipes, 6x7 inch each.

name: Alcohol-Based Hand Sanitizer Gel, 1L Pump
description: 70% ethyl-alcohol hand sanitizer gel with moisturizers. 1 liter pump-bottle. Compliant with WHO formulation guidance.
